product_name: Level 5 Replacement Aluminum-Body Skimming Blade End Caps
tags: 4-959, clearance, Level 5, Parts
short_description: LEVEL5 skimming blade replacement end caps clip onto either end of any LEVEL5 aluminum-body skimming blade.
description_text: LEVEL5 skimming blade replacement end caps clip onto either end of any LEVEL5 aluminum-body skimming blade. If you have misplaced or damaged your skimming blade end caps, this set of two LEVEL5 skimming blade end caps will quickly and easily replace your old ones. Drywall skimming blade end caps assist in holding the replaceable stainless steel blade insert in place. They also ensure that the LEVEL5 skimming blade is easy to clean - the caps prohibit mud from entering the extruded aluminum housing during use. LEVEL5 skimming blade end caps are comprised of durable nylon composite. This set includes both a left and right end cap.
